title: Non-record: ACN Output Accumulator on the Naive Baseline
author: chrico-bu-uab

data.description: Adds each transformer block hidden state to the final pre-final_norm representation using learnable per-layer scalar output scales initialized to zero and gated by ACN_OUTPUT=1.
Uses tied embeddings in the baseline model.
Uses grouped query attention with 8 query heads and 4 key/value heads.

novel_contributions: ACN output accumulator added to the official baseline
Per-layer learnable output scales initialized to zero
ACN enabled via ACN_OUTPUT=1 as a strict superset of the baseline
Single-seed idea probe showing a small per-step improvement but no wallclock gain due to implementation overhead
